# True positive samples — these SHOULD trigger secret detection
# NOTE: Do not place real tokens here. Use obviously fake values.
# Some tokens must be constructed at runtime to avoid GitHub Push Protection.

# AWS Access Key ID (fake)
AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE

# Password assignment
password = "mysecretpassword123"

# API key assignment
api_key = "sk-1234567890abcdefghij"
